response:
Pros and Cons of Remote Work

| Pros (Advantages)                         | Cons (Challenges)                       |
|-------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------|
| 1. Greater flexibility in schedule and location | 1. Potential for isolation / reduced social interaction |
| 2. Elimination or reduction of commuting time and costs | 2. Blurred boundaries between work and personal life |
| 3. Access to a wider talent pool for employers and more job opportunities for workers | 3. Reliance on technology and possible communication or infrastructure issues |
